untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking consecutive limit-up days and dynamic position sizing (1/(1+0.1*consecutive_days)), which requires state management and multi-bar pattern recognition not expressible in single-bar indicator conditions. 'Limit bid' entry and 'market reaches 10 consecutive limit-ups' exit require bar classification logic unavailable in the indicator set. The core logic depends on counting consecutive price limit moves and adjusting position size accordingly—these require custom state variables or lookback functions beyond the allowed operator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price extremes (pivot as proxy for limit moves) and positive returns as expected value proxy, but this loses the essential consecutive-move counting and position-scaling discipline that defines the signal. The signal is fundamentally about pattern recognition across multiple bars with memory state, not point-in-time indicator levels.
